rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the 32-bit arithmetic overflow on line 17 due to the multiplication of count and sizeof(Record) both being cast to uint32_t.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes widening the computation to size_t, which forces the multiplication into size_t arithmetic, satisfying the local fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests using std::vector<Record> or std::unique_ptr<Record[]> to manage allocation, which inherently handles overflow, satisfying the global fix criterion.
